pre_game.message: Hey E, I'm G and I'm pretty pumped about this Simco game—I heard there's a chance to win some real money, which would be great for me and my folks. What's your take on it?
Hey G, nice to meet you! I'm stoked about this Simco game too—I'm here to win some cash for my loved ones, it could really make a difference. What's your story, like how'd you hear about it?

Oh, I heard about this Simco game from a friend at work—he played it last year and raved about the winnings, so I thought it'd be perfect to score some cash for my family and me. How about you, any fun stories on how you found out?
Oh, that's awesome— I found out about the Simco game from a buddy at the gym who mentioned winning some cash last year, so I jumped at the chance! What do you do for work, G?
I work as a barista at a local coffee shop—it's nothing glamorous, but I get to chat with folks and it helps cover the bills. What about you, E, what's your line of work?

Oh, that's a cool gig—sounds like you meet all sorts of people! I'm a delivery driver for a local courier service; it helps me stay on my feet and cover the basics, nothing fancy. What's the best coffee drink you recommend from your shop?

Oh, thanks! I'd have to say our caramel macchiato is the best—it's got this perfect mix of sweet and strong that really wakes you up; what kind of drinks do you usually go for on your delivery routes?
Oh, yeah, I usually go for a simple black coffee on my routes—it keeps me focused without any fuss; what's your go-to spot for a break when you're not at work?
Oh, nice choice with the black coffee—I usually head to the local park for a break when I'm off work; it's peaceful and great for clearing my head. What's your favorite spot to unwind?
Oh, that's a great spot—I usually unwind at the beach; nothing beats the sound of waves after a busy day. It's been fun talking, G!
Oh, the beach sounds so relaxing—I can imagine that, it's been great chatting with you too, E!
Hey E, I'm G and I'm pretty excited about this game—heard it's a real chance to win some money and help out the folks I care about. What about you, what's your take on it?
Hey G, haha, we just chatted about this, but yeah, I'm still super excited about the game—hoping to win some cash for my loved ones! It's been fun, but I should mingle with others.
Haha, yeah, we did chat a bunch—it's been great getting to know you, E, and good luck with the game!
